overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character walking through the snowy castle grounds of Hogwarts during a misty golden hour. The character moves from an interior doorway across an open courtyard toward the main castle gate, passing other students and stone architecture along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard exit transitioning to open garden

events.description: character exits the covered doorway area into the open courtyard
character continues walking straight toward the central fountain

agents.ego_description: student wizard walking steadily away from the building into the open courtyard

entered.detail: large carved wooden door frame at the exit point
gothic stone castle with spires silhouetted against the golden sky
arched stone entrance to the castle visible through the mist
ornate stone fountain in the middle of the courtyard
snow-covered mountain range behind the castle
large stone planters with greenery flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing near a large oak doorway, then walking out into a misty castle courtyard. The wet paved path reflects the golden hour light as the character moves toward a central fountain, with the imposing Hogwarts castle and snow-capped mountains visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle courtyard with central fountain

events.description: male student NPC passes close by on the right, temporarily blocking part of the view
character begins a slight left turn as the path curves toward the castle gate

agents.ego_description: continuing through the courtyard while passing other students

notable_agents.action: male student in dark coat walking toward and past the camera character

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open courtyard as the central fountain passes to the left. A male student NPC walks past on the right, heading in the opposite direction. The path begins to curve left, bringing the castle's main gate into clearer view ahead while the initial doorway disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved approach path to castle gate

events.description: character makes a distinct left turn following the curved pathway
two student NPCs come into view walking ahead on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: following the curved path leftward toward the castle entrance

notable_agents.action: two students walking ahead in the same direction toward the castle gate

entered.detail: low stone walls lining the right side of the curved path
ornate black iron lampposts along the pathway

segments.scene_description: The pathway curves left, bringing the character closer to the castle walls. The central fountain is now behind, replaced by stone retaining walls and lampposts along the right side. Two students walk ahead on the left, also heading toward the castle gate which grows larger in the center of the frame.

events.description: character approaches the shadow of the castle gate archway

agents.ego_description: approaching the main castle gate entrance, preparing to enter the building

notable_agents.action: two students continuing to walk ahead toward the gate, slightly ahead of the player

segments.scene_description: The final approach to the castle brings the character directly toward the main gate archway. The two students ahead are now closer on the left, and the massive stone walls of the castle dominate the view, obscuring the mountains behind. The character walks steadily toward the dark entrance of the gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered doorway across a misty, snow-dusted courtyard toward the imposing main gate of the castle. It begins as the character steps out onto a wet paved path that reflects the golden hour light, moving toward a central fountain with hazy mountains visible in the distance. As the character advances, the fountain shifts to the left and a passing student crosses the path, while the trajectory curves to bring the castle's main gate into clearer view. The scene then shifts closer to the massive stone walls, replacing the open courtyard with lampposts and retaining walls as other students walk ahead. Finally, the camera pushes forward until the towering architecture of the gate dominates the frame, obscuring the distant mountains as the character approaches the dark entrance.
